content:
- Read previous progress and parsed .ralph/current_tasks.md for all active tasks.
- Applied selection rules: there are many passes=false tasks; story-rust-system-harness still has pending ultra_high chain tasks (12/13/15), and 12 is blocked by task 08. Per story-chain + priority constraints, selected task 08 next to unblock ultra_high progression.
- Wrote .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/08-task-ha-worker-select-loop-and-action-dispatch.md to .ralph/current_task.txt and stopped immediately.

- Read progress log via .ralph/progress_read.sh; no prior entries were shown.
- User asked whether there is a Rust-proper alternative to panics in tests.
- Preparing concise guidance: prefer Result-returning tests with ?, assert macros, and richer error context; avoid unwrap/expect/panic where possible.
